name: Artanis
description: A tough Bruiser that deals high damage if the enemy team is unable to shut him down.
title: Hierarch of the Daelaam
info: Despite his relative youth, Artanis was named Hierarch of the Daelaam after the fall of Aiur. Driven by the promise of a brighter future, he hopes to reclaim the protoss' fallen home world and rebuild their once glorious civilization.<n/><n/>Artanis is FREE to purchasers of StarCraft® II: Legacy of the Void™

Artanis.name: Blade Dash
Artanis.description: Dash forward and deal 63 (+4% per level) damage to enemies, then return and deal 171 (+4% per level) damage. Every enemy hit reduces the cooldown on Shield Overload by 1 second, and Heroes by 2 seconds.

Artanis.name: Twin Blades
Artanis.description: Artanis's next Basic Attack immediately causes him to charge a short distance and strike the enemy 2 times.

Artanis.name: Phase Prism
Artanis.description: Fire a Phase Prism that deals 66 (+4% per level) damage to the first Hero hit and swaps Artanis's position with theirs. Hitting a Hero also grants Artanis Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds. Can be used during Blade Dash.

Artanis.name: Purifier Beam
Artanis.description: Target an enemy Hero with an orbital beam from the Spear of Adun, dealing 184 (+4% per level) damage per second for 8 seconds. The beam will chase the target as they move. Unlimited range.

Artanis.name: Suppression Pulse
Artanis.description: Fire a large area pulse from the Spear of Adun, dealing 114 (+4% per level) damage and Blinding enemies for 4 seconds. Unlimited range.

Artanis.name: Shield Overload
Artanis.description: After taking damage while below 75% Health, Artanis gains a 365 (+4% per level) Shield for 5 seconds. Basic Attacks lower the cooldown of Shield Overload by 4 seconds.

1.name: Reactive Parry
1.description: Damaging enemy Heroes with Twin Blades or Blade Dash grants Artanis 50 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing its damage by 50%.  Stores up to 2 charges.

1.name: Amateur Opponent
1.description: Twin Blades attacks deal 150% bonus damage to non-Heroes.

1.name: Protector Of Aiur
1.description: Quest: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase Artanis's Attack damage by 0.1%. Takedowns grant 1% bonus damage.

4.name: Psionic Synergy
4.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Phase Prism grants 30 Armor for 5 seconds.

4.name: Shield Battery
4.description: Shield Overload's cooldown recharges 125% faster while its Shield is active.  Passive: Reduce Shield Overload's cooldown by 4 seconds.

4.name: Shield Surge
4.description: Increases Shield Overload's Shields by 80% while below 25% Health.

7.name: Solarite Reaper
7.description: Increases the damage of the first dash of Blade Dash by 175%.

7.name: Chrono Surge
7.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Phase Prism grants 40% bonus Attack Speed for 5 seconds and Slows the enemy's Movement Speed by 30% for 4 seconds.

7.name: Final Cut
7.description: After using an Ability, your next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 40% additional damage. While under 25% Health, this damage bonus is increased to 60%.

10.name: Suppression Pulse
10.description: Fire a large area pulse from the Spear of Adun, dealing 114 (+4% per level) damage and Blinding enemies for 4 seconds. Unlimited range.

10.name: Purifier Beam
10.description: Target an enemy Hero with an orbital beam from the Spear of Adun, dealing 184 (+4% per level) damage per second for 8 seconds. The beam will chase the target as they move. Unlimited range.

13.name: Templar's Zeal
13.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Blade Dash from 50 to 25. Each time that Shield Overload activates, reduce the cooldown of Blade Dash by 6 seconds.

13.name: Triple Strike
13.description: Increases Twin Blades's number of Basic Attacks to 3, but increase its cooldown by 1 second.

13.name: Graviton Vortex
13.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Phase Prism from 50 to 25. Hitting an enemy Hero with Basic Attacks or Blade Dash reduces the cooldown of Phase Prism by 2 seconds.

13.name: Phase Bulwark
13.description: Shield Overload grants 50 Spell Armor while active and for 2 seconds after it expires.

16.name: Titan Killer
16.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 0.5% of the target's maximum Health in damage, increased to 1.5% when empowered by Twin Blades.

16.name: Force of Will
16.description: Casting Basic Abilities reduces the cooldown of Shield Overload by 5 seconds.

16.name: Blades of a Templar
16.description: Increase Attack Speed by 20%. Basic Attacks Slow by 20% for 1.25 seconds.

20.name: Orbital Bombardment
20.description: Suppression Pulse gains an additional charge.  There is a 10 second cooldown between uses.

20.name: Target Purified
20.description: Increase the speed of Purifier Beam by 15%. If the target of Purifier Beam dies, it automatically recasts on the nearest visible enemy Hero.

20.name: Zealot Charge
20.description: Increase Twin Blades' charge distance by 75%.

20.name: Plasma Burn
20.description: While Shield Overload is active, deal 70 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.

tooltipMarkup.ArtanisBladeDash: Dash forward and deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArtanisBladeDashFirstDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies, then return and deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArtanisBladeDashSecondDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. Every enemy hit reduces the cooldown on Shield Overload by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ArtanisBladeDashNonHeroModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> second, and Heroes by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ArtanisBladeDashHeroModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisBladeDashSolariteReaperTalent: Increases the damage of the first dash of Blade Dash by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ArtanisBladeDashSolariteReaper,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value*(100)"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisBladeDashTemplarsZealTalent: Reduce the Mana cost of Blade Dash from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ArtanisBladeDash,Cost.Vital[Energy]"Player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ArtanisBladeDash,Cost.Vital[Energy]+Talent,ArtanisBladeDashTemplarsZeal,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"Player="0"/></c>. Each time that Shield Overload activates, reduce the cooldown of Blade Dash by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ArtanisBladeDashTemplarsZealModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisFinalCut: After using an Ability, your next Basic Attack within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisFinalCutBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ArtanisFinalCutBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"player="0"/>%</c> additional damage. While under <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Health, this damage bonus is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Behavior,ArtanisFinalCutBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]+Effect,ArtanisFinalCutModifyPlayer,EffectArray[0].Value)"player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisPhasePrism: Fire a Phase Prism that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArtanisPhasePrismDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first Hero hit and swaps Artanis's position with theirs. Hitting a Hero also grants Artanis Unstoppable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisPhasePrism,Duration"precision="2"/> </c>seconds. Can be used during Blade Dash.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisPhasePrismChronoSurgeTalent: Hitting an enemy Hero with Phase Prism grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisPhasePrismChronoSurge,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> bonus Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisPhasePrismChronoSurge,Duration"/></c> seconds and Slows the enemy's Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ArtanisPhasePrismChronoSurgeSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisPhasePrismChronoSurgeSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisPhasePrismGravitonVortexTalent: Reduce the Mana cost of Phase Prism from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ArtanisPhasePrism,Cost.Vital[Energy]"Player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ArtanisPhasePrism,Cost.Vital[Energy]+Talent,ArtanisPhasePrismGravitonVortex,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"Player="0"/></c>. Hitting an enemy Hero with Basic Attacks or Blade Dash reduces the cooldown of Phase Prism by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ArtanisPhasePrismGravitonVortexModifyCooldownBasicAttacks,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisPhasePrismPsionicSynergyTalent: Hitting an enemy Hero with Phase Prism grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisPhasePrismArmorBehaviorPsionicSynergy,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisPhasePrismArmorBehaviorPsionicSynergy,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisPlasmaBurn: While Shield Overload is active, deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArtanisShieldOverloadPlasmaBurnTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage per second to nearby enemies.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisProtectorOfAiurTalent: Quest: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase Artanis's Attack damage by %. Takedowns grant % bonus damage.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisShieldOverloadForceofWillTalent: Casting Basic Abilities reduces the cooldown of Shield Overload by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ArtanisShieldOverloadForceofWillSubtractCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisShieldOverloadPhaseBulwarkTalent: Shield Overload grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisShieldOverloadActiveSpellArmorPhaseBulwark,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor while active and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisShieldOverloadTemporarySpellArmorPhaseBulwark,Duration"/></c> seconds after it expires.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisShieldOverloadShieldBatteryTalent: Shield Overload's cooldown recharges <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(-Effect,ArtanisShieldOverloadShieldBatteryModifyCooldownCDR,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse)/(Behavior,ArtanisShieldOverloadShieldBattery,Period)*100"/>%</c> faster while its Shield is active. <n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce Shield Overload's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ArtanisShieldOverloadShieldBattery,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisShieldOverloadShieldSurgeTalentNe: Increases Shield Overload's Shields by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArtanisShieldSurgeCatalogReference,XP*100"/>%</c> while below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisShieldOverloadTrait: After taking damage while below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Health, Artanis gains a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisShieldOverload,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> Shield for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisShieldOverload,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds. Basic Attacks lower the cooldown of Shield Overload by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ArtanisShieldOverloadSubtractCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisSpearofAdunPurifierBeam: Target an enemy Hero with an orbital beam from the Spear of Adun, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArtanisSpearofAdunPurifierBeamDamage,Amount*4"/></c> damage per second for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisSpearofAdunPurifierBeamTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. The beam will chase the target as they move. Unlimited range.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisSpearofAdunPurifierBeamTargetPuri: Increase the speed of Purifier Beam by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,ArtanisSpearofAdunPurifierBeamTargetPurified,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value/Unit,ArtanisSpearofAdunPurifierBeamInvisibleTrackingUnit,Speed"Player="0"/>%</c>. If the target of Purifier Beam dies, it automatically recasts on the nearest visible enemy Hero.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisSpearofAdunSuppressionPulse: Fire a large area pulse from the Spear of Adun, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArtanisSpearofAdunSuppressionPulseDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Blinding enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisSpearofAdunSuppressionPulseBlind,Duration"/></c> seconds. Unlimited range.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisSpearofAdunSuppressionPulseOrbita: Suppression Pulse gains an additional charge.  There is a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ArtanisSpearofAdunSuppressionPulse,Cost[0].Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> second cooldown between uses.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisTwinBlades: Artanis's next Basic Attack immediately causes him to charge a short distance and strike the enemy <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> times.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisTwinBladesAmateurOpponentTalent: Twin Blades attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArtanisTwinBladesAmateurOpponentDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ArtanisTwinBladesAmateurOpponent].Modifier*100" precision="1"/>%</c> bonus damage to non-Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisTwinBladesBladesofaTemplar: Increase Attack Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ArtanisAttackSpeedBuffBladesofaTemplar,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c>. Basic Attacks Slow by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ArtanisMovementSpeedSlowBladesofaTemplar,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisMovementSpeedSlowBladesofaTemplar,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisTwinBladesReactiveParryTalent: Damaging enemy Heroes with Twin Blades or Blade Dash grants Artanis <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisReactiveParryBlock,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/></c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing its damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ArtanisReactiveParryBlock,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisTwinBladesTitanKillerTalent: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to<c val="#TooltipNumbers"> <d ref="100*Effect,ArtanisTwinBladesTitanKillerWeaponDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"Precision="2"/>%</c> of the target's maximum Health in damage, increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ArtanisTwinBladesTitanKillerTwinBladesDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"Precision="2"/>%</c> when empowered by Twin Blades.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisTwinBladesTripleStrikeTalent: Increases Twin Blades's number of Basic Attacks to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c>, but increase its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ArtanisTwinBladesTripleStrike,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.ArtanisTwinBladesZealotChargeTalent: Increase Twin Blades' charge distance by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.
